name: KTX2 CI fixture
description: Test-only mood that exercises the compressed KTX2/UASTC-HDR environment path in CI. Never offered in the picker; reachable only through the ?moodOverride test hook.

source.title: Basis UASTC HDR 4x4 sample (2d_uastc_hdr4x4.ktx2)
source.notes: CI fixture, not content: a 1.3 kB genuine UASTC HDR container (DFD colorModel 0xA7, Zstd supercompressed) whose decode requires the Basis wasm transcoder wherever the GPU lacks native ASTC HDR — which includes CI's SwiftShader. sceneLightScale is 1 and there is no rig because this mood is asserted on, never looked at.
